text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
53 
MDCD_RX_TOTAL_SPEND 
LABEL: 
Medicaid Payment Amount — Rx 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicaid payment amount from all pharmacy (RX) claims for the beneficiary 
during the year. Note that this dollar amount may be an undercount if the beneficiary had managed 
care claims. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Pharmacy Claims file (derived) 
VALUES: 
$ 
COMMENT: 
CCW calculates this variable as the sum of
